title: trifolium dubium
intro: Trifolium dubium, also known as the lesser trefoil, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the pea family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium dubium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting kidney function. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
